channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Intel's new CEO halves management layers, stock surges nearly 500%
item.description: In 13 months, Lip-Bu Tan turned around Intel, attracting investments from Nvidia and others after the company faced debt and AI setbacks.

item.title: Who is Chris Olah? The atheist Anthropic cofounder seated next to the Pope at the Vatican
item.description: The Anthropic cofounder, worth $8 billion, won a $100,000 Thiel Fellowship in 2012.

item.title: Texas surpasses California as new Fortune 500 capital
item.description: Texas now hosts 57 Fortune 500 companies, taking the lead from California.

item.title: Women lead a record 11.2% of Fortune 500 companies in 2026, but gains came amid high-profile exits
item.description: Internal promotions and external hires helped the Fortune 500 achieve a new high in women CEOs.
